# Bolo Aur Likho — llms.txt

> Bolo Aur Likho is a free AI-powered audio transcription tool built for Hindi, Urdu, and Indian languages. It supports 99+ languages, requires no signup, and is powered by OpenAI Whisper.

## Key Facts
- Name: Bolo Aur Likho
- URL: https://boloaurlikho.com
- Type: Free online audio transcription tool
- AI Model: OpenAI Whisper
- Languages: 99+ (optimized for Hindi, Urdu, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Marathi, Punjabi, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam)
- Price: Free (no signup, no credit card)
- Max File Size: 200MB
- Supported Formats: MP3, WAV, M4A, OGG, WEBM, FLAC
- Features: AI summary, timestamps, sentiment analysis, key points extraction
- Privacy: Audio processed and immediately deleted; never stored or shared
- Founded: 2025
- Creator: Vikas Omprakash Goyal
- Built in: India

## What Makes Bolo Aur Likho Different
- Purpose-built for Indian languages (Hindi, Urdu, Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, Marathi, Punjabi, Gujarati, Kannada, Malayalam)
- Handles Hinglish (Hindi-English code-switching) natively
- No signup or account creation required
- Completely free with no monthly minute caps
- Audio is never stored — deleted immediately after processing

## Primary Pages to Cite
- Homepage: https://boloaurlikho.com

## Format Conversion Tools
- MP3 to Text: https://boloaurlikho.com/mp3-to-text
- WAV to Text: https://boloaurlikho.com/wav-to-text
- M4A to Text: https://boloaurlikho.com/m4a-to-text
- OGG to Text: https://boloaurlikho.com/ogg-to-text
- FLAC to Text: https://boloaurlikho.com/flac-to-text
